overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking through an abstract concrete park with geometric structures and colorful painted walls. The character moves from narrow enclosed passages between tall concrete walls into a wide open plaza area with vibrant murals under clear afternoon sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow concrete canyon passage between tall walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow enclosed concrete passage with tall walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall weathered concrete wall forming the left boundary of the narrow passage
tall weathered concrete wall forming the right boundary of the narrow passage
rough concrete ground surface with scattered debris
piles of broken concrete and rubble scattered along the passage

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed concrete canyon with tall walls on both sides blocking most of the sky. The ground is rough concrete with scattered rubble debris, creating a confined corridor-like environment.

events.description: exits narrow canyon into more open transitional space with visible sky
emerges from shadow into direct sunlight as the walls open up

agents.ego_description: turning left and moving along a graffiti-covered wall as the enclosed space opens up

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered with red and black graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and exits the narrow canyon into a transitional area. A graffiti-covered concrete wall appears on the left as the space opens up to the sky, transitioning from shadow to bright sunlight while rubble remains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete plaza with colorful geometric murals

events.description: enters wide open plaza with brightly painted geometric walls
slight turn to follow the curved path along the colorful wall

agents.ego_description: walking along a wide plaza path beside vibrant geometrically painted concrete walls

entered.detail: concrete wall painted with bright geometric patterns in pink, blue, yellow, and green
tall pointed concrete tower structure rising against the sky
cluster of angular geometric concrete formations with pointed tops

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open plaza with brightly colored geometric murals covering the concrete walls. Tall abstract concrete spires and angular structures rise in the background under a clear blue sky as the character walks along the curved path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a confined concrete corridor that gradually expands into a vibrant, open-air plaza. It begins by trailing the character through a narrow concrete canyon where tall walls block the sky and rubble litters the rough ground. As the character turns left, the space opens up to the sky and the lighting shifts from deep shadow to bright sunlight, revealing a graffiti-covered wall. The scene then expands further as the character emerges into a wide plaza featuring brightly colored geometric murals and a curved path. Finally, the view opens to reveal tall abstract concrete spires and angular structures rising against a clear blue sky.
